title: Advocate Rohit Sud elected President of the Punjab and Haryana High Court Bar Association
description: Advocate Rohit Sud was elected the President of Punjab and Haryana High Court Bar Association (PHHCBA) on Saturday.The polling for the Bar Association's executive body was held on Friday.In the vote count that concluded around midnight, Sud secured 1,483 votes, defeating his nearest rival Senior Advocate Parminder Singh Sekhon by 96 votes. Sekhon secured 1387 votes.A total of six candidates were in fray for the post of President. Punjab & Haryana High Court Bar AssociationMeanwhile, Advocat
